positive: A highly stylized, modern illustration featuring a vibrant, abstract hummingbird suspended in motion. The bird is rendered with geometric precision and iridescent, jewel-toned feather details, contrasting sharply against a deep indigo and teal gradient background. Below the hummingbird, stylized floral elements—tropical ginger lilies and monstera leaves—are integrated, forming a symmetrical, symmetrical wreath pattern. The composition should be centered and balanced, utilizing strong silhouettes and clean linework. The overall aesthetic is celebratory, tropical, and visually arresting, suitable for repeat pattern or isolated print art. Mid-century modern illustration style with crisp vector quality, high contrast, and dramatic rim lighting.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, noise, watermark, text, signature, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, grain, messy, poorly drawn, photorealistic, grainy, dirty, clutter, indistinguishable
